name: @assessment/backend-assessment
description: Backend Engineer Technical Assessment - gRPC Microservices with NestJS

scripts.db:migrate: cd packages/prisma && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace=@assessment/security && npm run build --workspace=@assessment/proto
scripts.test: cd apps/user-service && npm test && cd ../wallet-service && npm test
scripts.clean: find . -name 'node_modules' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' + && find . -name 'dist' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' + && find . -name '.assessment-lock' -type f -delete

author: Assessment Team
